steps.title: Find the monthly rate
steps.content:
The tree grows $93$ centimeters every $m$ months, so the monthly rate is
$$\frac{93}{m}$$
centimeters per month.

steps.title: Convert years to months
steps.content:
There are $12$ months in one year, so $k$ years is
$$12k$$
months.

steps.title: Multiply rate by time
steps.content: The growth over $k$ years is $$\frac{93}{m}(12k)=\frac{1{,}116k}{m}$$ The answer is D.
